component.name: LGL System Loadout
component.summary: Guided setup wizard for Fedora gaming, content creation, and development

description.p: LGL System Loadout is a graphical wizard that gets a fresh Fedora install ready in minutes. Choose exactly what you want from a curated list of packages across gaming, multimedia, content creation, development tools, browsers, communication apps, GPU drivers, virtualisation, KDE theming, and the CachyOS kernel.

ul.li: No defaults — nothing is pre-selected
Every item shows its current installed state before you commit
All checks run concurrently so pages load instantly
Installs only — nothing is removed without your knowledge
Single polkit password prompt via pkexec
Gaming — Steam, Lutris, Wine, Heroic, MangoHud, vkBasalt, ProtonUp-Qt, and more
Content Creation — OBS Studio, Kdenlive, GIMP, Inkscape, Audacity, Blender
GPU Drivers — AMD Mesa, Vulkan, VA-API
Browsers — Firefox, Chromium, Chrome, Brave, Vivaldi, LibreWolf
Communication — Thunderbird, Discord, Vesktop, Spotify
Virtualisation — virt-manager, libvirt
KDE Theming — KZones, Panel Colorizer
CachyOS Kernel — performance-optimised kernel with BORE scheduler
System Tools — btop, fastfetch, distrobox, timeshift, and more
Multimedia — ffmpeg, GStreamer plugins, VLC
Fixed Panel Colorizer download failing due to spaces in temp directory path
Fixed Panel Colorizer log showing garbled binary text
Fixed KZones download failing due to same space-in-path issue
Fixed kernel warning box overlapping log output on System Update page
Clarified reboot confirmation dialog wording
Added Secure Boot warning on CachyOS Kernel page
